subtitle: Director, IT Portfolio Management -- Enterprise PMO | Multi-Factor Prioritization | IT Financial Governance
summary_text: Technology executive with 14 years leading enterprise IT portfolios, transformation programs, and cross-functional delivery at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB). As the first CTO in MMI's 45-year history, governed a $15M+ IT operating budget within $30-50M total IT spend, across 35+ direct and 75+ extended team members. Built the Enterprise PMO from scratch and delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence. Operated a multi-factor investment prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governing sprint-over-sprint decisions across a 45-50 person delivery organization and 12+ executive stakeholders. Maintained year-over-year budget adherence and accurate financial forecasting through major pandemic disruption. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated cross-functional project governance across IT and non-IT functions; delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio.

Operated multi-factor investment prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governing sprint-over-sprint decisions across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders and a 45-50 person delivery organization; the equity mechanism prevented any single function from dominating or being ignored.

Governed $15M+ IT operating budget within $30-50M total IT spend; financial forecasting, variance analysis, and executive financial reporting; maintained year-over-year budget adherence and accurate forecasting through major pandemic disruption.

Owned vendor governance across the full vendor lifecycle: SoW authorship, vendor budget and burn-rate tracking, multi-year vendor relationships, and resource leveling across in-house, nearshore, and offshore teams.
Owned multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years; multi-product platform extensibility architected from single-product origin.

Led full enterprise contact center / communications platform transformation with zero service disruption on day-one go-live; modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints) -- doubled development throughput.
Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

skills.items: Enterprise PMO Governance, Multi-Factor Prioritization, Project Delivery Discipline, Multi-Stakeholder Roadmap, Scope/Schedule/Budget
Budget Management ($15M+ Operating; $30-50M Total), Financial Forecasting, Variance Analysis, Executive Financial Reporting
SoW Authorship, Vendor Budget & Burn-Rate Tracking, Multi-Year Vendor Relationships, Build-Buy-Partner Decisions
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
DataRobot (Production ML), Power BI, Tableau, SQL/T-SQL, AI Architecture Evaluation
